command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 bash << 'REMOTE'
set -e
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

echo '=== APPEND SECOND-PASS GITIGNORE PATTERNS ==='
cat >> .gitignore << 'GITIGNORE'

# Second-pass runtime artifacts (2026-06-25, WP-3 3060/qwen3:8b)
*.pre-cleanup-backup
memory/operator/failed/
memory/operator/shared/chatgpt-activity-log.jsonl
memory/orchestration/cycles/
memory/phase-advancement/
memory/phase-controller/
n8n-workflows/*backup*
GITIGNORE
echo "second-pass gitignore appended"

echo '=== COMMIT WAVE 3: runtime code + tests + updated gitignore ==='
git add .gitignore
git add runtime/phase_advancement_controller.py runtime/phase_implementation_staging.py 2>/dev/null || true
git add tests/test_moreno_governed_async_v253.py tests/test_moreno_governed_authoring_integration.py     tests/test_moreno_governed_executor.py tests/test_moreno_operator_bridge_v25.py 2>/dev/null || true
STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only | wc -l)
echo "staged: $STAGED files"
git diff --cached --name-only
git commit -m "chore: second-pass cleanup — runtime code, tests, additional gitignore patterns

WP-3 (3060/qwen3:8b 49.3s): classified 15 remaining paths
  gitignore: memory/operator/failed, orchestration/cycles, phase-advancement, phase-controller,
             n8n backup files, chatgpt-activity-log, *.pre-cleanup-backup
  commit_candidate: 2 runtime py files, 4 test files

Task record: /home/jose/moreno-tasks/intake/task-repo-cleanup-20260625.json"

echo '=== FINAL STATUS ==='
git status --short
echo '=== LOG ==='
git log --oneline -5

REMOTE
echo DONE_1932
